title: K-200 Propulsion Acceptance Test Procedure
text:
# K-200 Propulsion Acceptance Test Procedure

Document number: MD-DOC-460-G. Revision: G. Type: procedure. Author: Sam Dreher. Created: 2025-01-29. Last modified: 2025-07-21. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Propulsion subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1012.
